name: ExtensionResearchStudy_ComparisonGroup_IntendedExposure
title: R5: Interventions or exposures in this comparisonGroup or cohort (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ResearchStudy.comparisonGroup.intendedExposure` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ResearchStudy.comparisonGroup.intendedExposure` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/EvidenceVariable)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ResearchStudy.comparisonGroup.intendedExposure` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/EvidenceVariable)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ResearchStudy.comparisonGroup.intendedExposure` has a context of ResearchStudy.arm based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ResearchStudy`.
Element `ResearchStudy.comparisonGroup.intendedExposure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
